pay.title: Pay invoice
pay.invalidInvoiceId: This payment link is invalid. The invoice identifier must be a positive whole number.
pay.loadError: Could not load invoice data from the network. Check the invoice ID or try again later.
pay.demoData: Demo data — the registry address is not configured or you are viewing a local preview.
pay.paymentNature: This payment is settled on-chain via the InvoiceRegistry contract using an ERC-20 transfer (payer to creditor).
pay.issuerRecords: Definitive legal and tax records are held by the issuer. The information above is an on-chain summary to assist verification.
pay.mockSuccessBody: This was a local simulation. A real payment will call payInvoice on the contract and update the status on-chain.
pay.explorerUnavailable: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_CHAIN_EXPLORER_URL to enable explorer links.
pay.alreadyPaid: This invoice is already marked as paid on-chain.
pay.cancelledNotice: This invoice has been cancelled. Do not send payment.
pay.verifyAuthenticityIntro: This hash is anchored on-chain. Compare it with the PDF or invoice document you received through a trusted channel.
pay.pdfCompareHint: Open your copy of the invoice and confirm the hash above matches exactly before you pay.
pay.worldIdCardIntro: The creditor registered with the InvoiceRegistry using World ID. This helps reduce impersonation at signup.
pay.worldIdComparePdf: Check that the World ID below matches the one printed on your invoice or PDF before you pay.
pay.worldIdUnavailable: World ID is not available on-chain for this invoice yet.
pay.tokenFallbackNote: Using local or default token metadata. Indexed tokens show richer details from ArcScan.
pay.arcScanLinkUnavailable: No block explorer is configured for this network.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page does not exist or the link may be incorrect. Use the navigation or the shortcuts below.

giveRight.title: Give right to vote
giveRight.description: As an admin, you can grant the right to vote to another address.

delegate.description: As a registered voter, you can delegate your voting power to another address.
delegate.cannotDelegate: You cannot delegate your vote because you have already voted in this ballot.

eventsTable.recentDescription: The last five events from the ballot contract.
